description: A roasted beef rib cut known for its tenderness, rich flavor, and marbling, typically served in slices as a centerpiece dish.
preparation_steps: Roast until it reaches the desired level of doneness.
Serve with its juices or accompaniments such as horseradish or gravy.

health_advice.benefits: Provides substantial protein, iron, and other nutrients found in red meat.
health_advice.risks: Can be high in saturated fat and is best eaten in moderation.
health_advice.healthy_tip: Keep portions moderate and balance the meal with vegetables rather than only rich side dishes.

dietary_notes.note: Gluten-free suitability depends on gravies, seasoning blends, and sauces served with it.

allergens: Possible gluten in gravy or seasoning mixes
Possible milk if butter-based finishes are used
